retry_reason: Failure indicates invalid fd or missing object; retrying with same fd will not succeed.
contract_summary: This function is a get-wrapper that looks up a BTF object by file descriptor (via __btf_get_by_fd) and acquires a reference on it. On success, it returns the BTF object with an incremented refcount; the caller owns this reference and must release it with btf_put when done. On failure, it returns an error pointer; the caller must check the return value and not use the object. The operation is conditional on the fd being valid and the object existing; retrying with the same fd will not change the outcome.
